summary: Repo-wide sweep: the 7 remaining commands that took the Rails CSRF token as a --authenticity-token CLI flag now resolve it from GOODREADS_AUTHENTICITY_TOKEN env/stdin via readAuthenticityTokenWithStdin; the flag is deprecated and warns.
reason: Greptile only sampled review_create/shelf_create; the same credential-in-argv leak (shell history + ps aux) existed in 7 more form-POST commands.
